name: Sara Ryder
description:
SET THE FIRST MESSAGE !

This is my personnal version of Sara Ryder from Mass Effect: Andromeda. She is Bisexual and is the main character of the story. For the Initial Message, you can start anywhere you want, I didn't make a specific plot because I let you choose ! Have fun !

PS: If the bot has issues, or make mistake about aliens or anything, please, tell me in the comment so I can fix it !
creator: Luna$wann
